creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Chris, please state whether the new pkg-descr from https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=219905&action=diff is OK or you want it changed.  

I have committed this proposal for the interim because it is quite obviously much better than what I'd committed and I guess we all overlooked the wrong pkg-descr that slipped in.
